revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23985667504|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ar:هاشينوهي سانشا تايساي]][[dag:Hachinohe Sansha Festival]][[dga:Hachinohe Sansha Festival]][[en:Hachinohe Sansha Taisai]][[eo:Hachinohe Sanŝa Taisai]][[fat:Hachinohe Sansha Afahyɛ]][[gpe:Hachinohe Sansha Taisai]][[ja:八戸三社大祭]][[kus:Hachinohe Sansha Festival]][[mos:Hachinohe Sansha Taisai]]
{{Short description|The festival of Hachinohe, Aomori, Japan}} [[File:Hachinohe Sansha Taisai Festival, 2 August 2014-002.JPG|right|thumb|270px|Float during the Hachinohe Sansha Taisai, 2014]] {{nihongo|'''Hachinohe Sansha Taisai'''|八戸三社大祭}} is a [[:en:Japanese festival|Japanese festival]] celebrated from July 31 to August 4 in [[:en:Hachinohe, Aomori|Hachinohe]], {{ill|Aomori Prefecture|en|Aomori Prefecture|qid=Q71699|lt=Aomori Prefecture|1=Aomori Prefecture}}, {{ill|Japan|en|Japan|qid=Q17|lt=Japan|1=Japan}}. Its rites center on three {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}}s: {{nihongo|Ogami|霊神社}}, {{nihongo|Shinra|新羅神社}}, and {{nihongo|Shinmei|神明宮}} {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=shrines|1=Shinto shrine}}. There is a procession of twenty-seven [[Matsuri float|floats]] and three ''[[mikoshi]]'' are also borne through the streets. It has a two hundred and ninety-year history and in 2004 was designated an {{ill|List of Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties|en|List of Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties|qid=Q111360896|lt=Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property|1=List of Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties}}.<ref>{{cite web |url=http://www.jnto.go.jp/eventcalendar/search_result_en.php?num=658 |title=Hachinohe Sansha Taisai Festival |publisher=[[Japan National Tourism Organization]] |accessdate=20 March 2011 |url-status=dead|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20120403025121/http://www.jnto.go.jp/eventcalendar/search_result_en.php?num=658 |archivedate=3 April 2012 }}</ref><ref>{{cite web |url=https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/heritage/detail/302/764 |title=Database of Registered National Cultural Properties |publisher=[[Agency for Cultural Affairs]] |accessdate=20 March 2011}}</ref>
On August 2, the Chōjasan Shinra Shrine holds the annual {{nihongo|Kiba Dakyuu|騎馬打球}} tournament. It is the traditional Kagami-style ''{{ill|dakyu|en|dakyu|qid=Q1052735|lt=dakyu|1=Dakyu}}'' and is held only in Hachinohe, {{ill|Yamagata Prefecture|en|Yamagata Prefecture|qid=Q125863|lt=Yamagata Prefecture|1=Yamagata Prefecture}}, and the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|en|Imperial Household Agency|qid=Q1143602|lt=Imperial Household Agency|1=Imperial Household Agency}}.<ref>{{cite web |url=http://www.city.hachinohe.aomori.jp/handlers/printcontent.cfm?GroupID=8&ContentID=69274&ThisPageURL=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.city.hachinohe.aomori.jp%2Findex.cfm%2F8%2C69274%2C40%2Chtml&EntryCode=4254 |title=Festivals of Hachinohe |publisher=Hachinohe City |accessdate=24 July 2014 |archive-date=28 September 2017 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170928005433/http://www.city.hachinohe.aomori.jp/handlers/printcontent.cfm?GroupID=8&ContentID=69274&ThisPageURL=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.city.hachinohe.aomori.jp%2Findex.cfm%2F8%2C69274%2C40%2Chtml&EntryCode=4254 |url-status=dead }}</ref>
==See also== *{{ill|List of festivals in Aomori Prefecture|en|List of festivals in Aomori Prefecture|qid=Q104861443|lt=List of festivals in Aomori Prefecture|1=List of festivals in Aomori Prefecture}} *{{ill|List of Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties|en|List of Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties|qid=Q111360896|lt=List of Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties|1=List of Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties}} *{{ill|Important Intangible Cultural Properties of Japan|en|Important Intangible Cultural Properties of Japan|qid=Q11644860|lt=Important Intangible Cultural Properties of Japan|1=Important Intangible Cultural Properties of Japan}} *{{ill|dakyu|en|dakyu|qid=Q1052735|lt=dakyu|1=Dakyu}}
==References== {{Reflist}}
==External links== {{commons Category|Hachinohe Sansha Taisai}} {{in lang|ja}} [https://web.archive.org/web/20110721014326/http://sanshataisai.matsuri-jp.com/ Hachinohe Sansha Taisai homepage]
